case.title: RIEGEL PRODUCTS CORP., INC., v. MEYER

opinion.h1: RIEGEL PRODUCTS CORP., INC., v. MEYER, 465 U.S. 1091 (1984)
opinion.p: RIEGEL PRODUCTS CORPORATION, INC., et al. v. Joseph W. MEYER. No. 83-1109.
Supreme Court of the United States
The petition for writ of certiorari is dismissed pursuant to Rule 53 of this Court.[ Riegel Products Corp., Inc., v. Meyer 465 U.S. 1091 (1984) ]
